description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Linux that runs on push and pull request events. The workflow should have two jobs, build-gcc-9 and build-clang-10, each running on ubuntu-latest and using a matrix strategy to build with Debug and Release configurations. For each job, clone DiligentTools and DiligentCore repositories, configure dependencies, set up CMake with specific compilers (GCC 9 or Clang 10), build the project, run tests, and upload artifacts for Release configurations.
